shortDescription: Character-filled 2-bedroom detached residence in Bayview Village featuring original details and modern upgrades.
fullDescription: Welcome to 28 Bayview Ridge in the vibrant Bayview Village neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The 2 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
